{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324011218CE7BE5C5B7112342F32F"}"},"total":22},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490995724874236696","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说的主线就是躺平无忧无虑的生活，就是大家希望的日子，虽然无聊，但是主角过的开心，很真实的，也没有太多的烦事，看个几十章还可以的，节奏很慢的，看久了就会有点无聊，主角的事业作者应该要抓紧了，我看到了100章还是这样的生活，就会有点烦了。不过今晚通宵看了4个小时，心里还是挺开心的，这也是我想过的农村生活吧，所以心态放平，生活可以如此美好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744143017,"group_id":"7450039292836990014","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你是我一生只会遇见一次的惊喜。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8BMMFRVkzZJwabm0Bkl16Xx5M/HVd9ZfUCI1OuPcvLR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/00985979e9974125a9531b49e630c65b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877987&x-signature=m9gOTCktSIMmVZBxcGzTebW50kA%3D","user_id":"2946309098831951","user_name":"九月有点甜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2946309098831951","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450039292836990014","book_info":{"abstract":"（轻松+悠闲+平淡+种田+日常+无戾气+无极品）
生活不止眼前的苟且，还有......诗和田园。
种茶，种菜，田野摘瓜果，爬树掏鸟窝。
遛猫，逗狗，入山摘蘑菇，下河捉螃蟹。
......
